nasb.text: Then they took what Micah had made and the priest who had belonged to him, and came to Laish, to a people quiet and secure, and struck them with the edge of the sword; and they burned the city with fire.

esv.text: But the people of Dan took what Micah had made, and the priest who belonged to him, and they came to Laish, to a people quiet and unsuspecting, and struck them with the edge of the sword and burned the city with fire.

cnv.text: 但人把米迦所做的神像和他的祭司都帶走，他們來到拉億，去到平靜安居的人民那裡，就用刀劍擊殺了他們，又用火燒了那城。

ccb.text: 但支派的人带着米迦的神像和他的祭司来到拉亿，那里的人生活安宁，毫无防范。他们杀掉当地的居民，放火烧了城。
